repos.name: ai-job-search
repos.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
repos.description_zh: 基于Claude Code构建的人工智能驱动的职位申请框架。分叉它，填写您的个人资料，让Claude评估工作、定制简历、撰写求职信并为您做好面试准备。

repos.name: OfficeCLI
repos.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
repos.description_zh: DeliverCLI是第一个也是最好的Office套件，专为人工智能代理读取、编辑和自动化Word、Excel和PowerPoint文件而构建。免费、开源、单一二进制，无需安装Office。

repos.name: herdr
repos.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
repos.description_zh: 位于您的终端中的代理多路转换器。

repos.name: claude-video
repos.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
repos.description_zh: 让克劳德能够观看任何视频。/观看下载、提取帧、转录，然后将一切交给Claude。

repos.name: knockoff
repos.description: Chrome extension that filters pseudo-brand junk out of Amazon. Buy from real, established brands.
repos.description_zh: Chrome扩展程序，可以过滤亚马逊中的伪品牌垃圾。从真正的知名品牌购买。

repos.name: OpenMontage
repos.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
repos.description_zh: 世界上第一个开源、代理视频制作系统。12条管道、52种工具、500+名代理技能。将您的人工智能编码助理变成完整的视频制作工作室。

repos.name: skills
repos.description: Skills for Design Engineers.
repos.description_zh: 设计工程师的技能。

repos.name: Wand-Enhancer
repos.description: Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app
repos.description_zh: Wand（WeMod）应用程序的高级用户体验和互操作性扩展

repos.name: codebase-memory-mcp
repos.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
repos.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图中-平均回购以毫秒为单位。158种语言，亚ms查询，令牌减少99%。单一静态二进制，零依赖关系。

repos.name: orca
repos.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
repos.description_zh: Orca是与平行代理舰队合作的ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在台式机和移动设备上提供。

repos.name: openwiki
repos.description: OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase.
repos.description_zh: Openiki是一个CLI，可以为您的代码库编写和维护代理文档。

repos.name: strix
repos.description: Open-source AI hackers to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
repos.description_zh: 开源AI黑客来查找和修复您的应用程序的漏洞。

repos.name: Vibe-Trading
repos.description: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
repos.description_zh: “Vibe-Trading：您的个人交易代理”

repos.name: OmniRoute
repos.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
repos.description_zh: 永远不要停止编码。免费人工智能门户：一个端点、160+个提供商（50+个免费），将Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline & Copilot连接到FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini。TEK +Caveman堆叠压缩可节省15-95%的令牌、智能自动回撤、HCP/A2 A、多模式API、桌面/PWA。

repos.name: ai-website-cloner-template
repos.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
repos.description_zh: 使用人工智能编码代理只需一个命令即可克隆任何网站

repos.name: DNSHE-FreeDomains
repos.description: 🌐 DNSHE Official - Stable & Free Subdomains for Developers. Support 180-day renewal window, Anycast DNS, and REST API. (us.ci, cc.cd, de5.net, ccwu.cc)
repos.description_zh: CLARDNSHE官方-为开发人员提供稳定且免费的子域名。支持180天续费窗口、Anycast DNS和REST API。（us.ci、cc.cd、de5.net、ccwu.cc）

repos.name: pocket-tts
repos.description: A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)
repos.description_zh: 适合您的中央处理器（和口袋）的TTC

repos.name: CubeSandbox
repos.description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
repos.description_zh: 适用于人工智能代理的即时、并发、安全且轻量级沙盒。

repos.name: daily_stock_analysis
repos.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。  LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
repos.description_zh: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源动态，实时新闻，决策浏览与自动推送，支持零收益定期运行。  LLM支持的多市场股票分析系统，具有多源市场数据、实时新闻、决策仪表板、自动通知和免费预定运行。

repos.name: pgrust
repos.description: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
repos.description_zh: 在Rust中重写了Postgs，现已通过100%的Postgs回归测试

repos.name: voicebox
repos.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
repos.description_zh: 开源人工智能语音工作室。克隆、口述、创建。

repos.name: native
repos.description: Toolkit for building native desktop apps
repos.description_zh: 用于构建原生桌面应用程序的工具包

repos.name: VoxCPM
repos.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
repos.description_zh: VoxCPM2：无令牌化TTC，用于多语言语音生成、创意语音设计和逼真克隆

repos.name: destructive_command_guard
repos.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
repos.description_zh: 破坏性命令守卫（dcg）用于阻止代理执行危险的git和shell命令。
